_comment: Per-device config for the the band auto-editor. Copy to config.json and fill in. All scripts read this so no paths are hardcoded. Run 'set up the auto-editor' in claude to generate it via the questionnaire.
capcut_draft_root: PATH/to/CapCut/User Data/Projects/com.lveditor.draft (or null if use_capcut=false -> MP4 only)
